{{Quote|You touch me and my master will murder you!|Durge's pilot droid|<ref name="Star Wars: Obsession">''[[Star Wars: Obsession]]''</ref>}}
'''Durge's pilot droid''' flew [[NovaSword Space Superiority Fighter|Durge's ship]] during the [[Gen'Dai/Legends|Gen'Dai's]] final year of life. The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] somewhat resembled [[Durge/Legends|Durge]] in appearance and temperament. The droid was decapitated by [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], although its head remained functional. Obi-Wan captured the head and used it to track down [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] and [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] to [[Boz Pity/Legends|Boz Pity]].

==Appearances==
